programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri kicks off Game Day as the reigning champ faces Torrence Chef T Gregoire and Joe Flamm in tackling fan-favorite flavors; judges Marcel Vigneron and Marcus Samuelsson are calling the plays and only one chef can win up to $20,000.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges three chefs to prove their pork chops by making a bacon dish, and the winner goes head-to-head with an all-star judge to see who can bring home the bacon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes four previous winners back to Flavortown Market for a nonstop super battle; he gives them each $100 to make a complete steakhouse feast in 60 minutes, but first, they have to participate in a dreaded Flavortown whammy auction.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is turning up the heat in Flavortown as the returning winner defends their title against Franklin Becker and Allison Fasano; the chefs must ignite the taste buds of judges Dale Talde and Claudette Zepeda with their spiciest dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.sub-title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Legends Tournament, Part 1
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites eight chefs to compete in a five-part racecourse for a $30,000 grand prize; the bottom ranking chefs must create a second guilty pleasure dish to avoid elimination.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Ego Nwodim tag-teams with Bobby Flay's pal, chef Michael Symon; chefs Brandon Baltzley and Bill Crites must think on the fly if they want to walk out with a win.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl
programme.desc: Twelve new contestants show off their barbecue skills to captains Bobby Flay, Sunny Anderson and Michale Voltaggio.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four determined chefs may think that combining ramen with fruity cereal is their biggest challenge, but a serious injury leaves one competitor stunned; the chefs must deal with a strange frozen food and show their point of view with meaty desserts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four lucky superfans get the chance of a lifetime to compete in the "Chopped" kitchen; they'll have to take on a giant gummy creature and an intimidating piece of protein for the main course before using two tricky ingredients for dessert.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four skilled sushi chefs compete to create appetizers with precision and potato chips; the chefs in the entrée round get creative with a prized fish and some candy, while choices in the dessert round impress the judges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Four brave chefs prioritize flavor over fear as they take on outrageously daring ingredients to make killer dishes for the judges; the chefs prove they have the chops to make a swamp-loving chomper tasty and try not be be stung by a shocking sweet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Veteran Chef Karen Akunowicz lights up Flay's kitchen with her personality and battles the Titans with her modern grandma cuisine; judge Scott Conant doesn't go easy on anyone with his high standards.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Chef Katsuji Tanabe's bravado is as big as his desire to take down Bobby Flay's Titans; Katsuji is desperate for his first big win, and it's up to judge Judy Joo to decide if it's his turn for victory.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: The Titans think they're ready to go up against Alex Guarnaschelli's protégé, Chef Michael Jenkins; Michael has judged each of the Titans before and uses that knowledge to his advantage.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Miami chef Adrianne Calvo won SOBE Food and Wine Festival's Triple Threat competition, but can she take down Bobby Flay's Titans on their home turf to win $25,000? OG restaurateur Rick Bayless amps up the pressure with his judging.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and ESPN's Sage Steele share a military connection with chefs Star Maye and Marie Yniguez as they put Bobby Flay through a set of drills.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chef Geoffrey Zakarian and TV host Carson Kressley team up to take down Bobby Flay and tackle his basic button-down fashion choices; seasoned chefs Chris Coleman and Siddharth Krishna hope to claim a head-turning win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Pastry chef Zac Young and SNL alum Cheri Oteri are the perfect pair to ruin Bobby Flay's night; they recruit pastry powerhouses Joe Murphy and Laura Ochikubo to turn up the heat.

programme.desc: Chef Geoffrey Zakarian and model Ashley Graham strike a pose to distract Bobby Flay while chefs Maiya Keck and Brian Cripps go in for the win.

programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso and comedian Jay Pharoah recruit pasta pros Sasha Grumman and Zach Chancey to bring the heat against Bobby Flay.

programme.desc: Comedian JB Smoove teams up with Michael Symon; chefs Mia Castro and Brandon Carter try to take Bobby down.

programme.desc: Chefs Cliff Crooks and Jet Tila join forces to hassle Bobby Flay into a loss; chefs Kimberly Gamble and Tom Berry get in on the fun and try to topple the king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is up to his ears in distractions courtesy of hosts Jaymee Sire and Andrew Zimmern, while chefs Byron Gomez and Sebastien Salomon tussle over a corny star ingredient.

programme.title: Jane Seymour, Kate Walsh share their skin secrets
programme.desc: Crepe Erase Ultra visibly transforms your skin with 9 super hydrators! Tune in to see how Jane Seymour and Kate Walsh keep their skin so smooth. Treat and repair the look of crepey skin.Shop at CrepeErase.com.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Fieri welcomes the Great 8 back into the arena to compete in the tough quarterfinals; eight of the world's best chefs go head-to-head in four sudden death battles and deal with the randomizer to earn a trip to the finale.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer asks the remaining four chefs to create arctic-themed cakes with a frozen layer; the top two chefs move on to the finale, and the bottom two chefs battle in a sudden-death round, hoping to impress judges Duff Goldman and Molly Yeh.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the final three chefs to create a spectacular dessert display inspired by one of three themes; Judges Duff Goldman, Shinmin Li, Jacques Torres, and Sherry Yard decide who will win $50,000 and the title of Ultimate Baking Champion.

programme.title: 24 in 24: Last Chef Standing
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Esther Choi give the remaining chefs three challenges that test their ability to think and cook fast, including a team relay race and a 15-minute fast-food dish. Expert judge Judy Joo sends two chefs home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy enlists the help of his mom, Penny, and his wife, Lori, in his Mother's Day Games featuring mom/kid teams who run family restaurants together; four unique sample ingredients to feature in their top seller, a "Prized Family Recipe" ingredients.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Beau MacMillan, Aarti Sequeira, Justin Warner and their moms shop and cook their way to a victory for charity; Guy Fieri's mom gives the judge-mom duos a list of mandatory ingredients; Guy has them do all the shopping using kiddie carts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Guy welcomes four supermoms to Flavortown Market to prove their culinary chops and serve up real deal home-cooked flavors; the moms must shop using an alphabet list of ingredients and then earn shopping money by answering kids' homework questions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of Italian; in Santa Barbara, Calif., Dennis Miller's riding shotgun for prime pizza; in Las Vegas, a vegan joint puts its spin on an Italian sandwich; a funky pizzeria stuffs chicken parm into stromboli.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gets into seafood, sandwiches and more; a joint in Baton Rouge, La., makes a Cuban sandwich, a Gainesville, Fla., bakery serves an artichoke croissant and a spot in Tallahassee, Fla., features pineapples.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going globe-trotting for gangster grub while staying stateside; he's getting a taste of lights-out lasagna Bolognese in Naples, FL.; a fresh take on shrimp and grits in Tallahassee, FL.; the bomb-braised chashu pork buns in Chicago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Laramie, Wyo., an old-school cafe has green chili burritos and pie; a spot in Anchorage, Alaska has blackened chicken gnocchi.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Triple D Nation: Around the World and Off-The-Hook
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading back for some global grub, starting with Thai in Phoenix, Ariz.; a Syracuse, N.Y., spot is still serving up legit Lebanese; Triple-D's first Druze restaurant is thriving in New York City.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging major meat, Mexican and more; a meaty mashup in Ohio slays it with a signature cheesesteak; a Minneapolis spot serves lights-out Thai tea pancakes; a Montana joint plates up carneasadaburritos.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into a meaty smorgasbord, starting with a funky Nashville joint that serves a skyscraper burger; in New Smyrna Beach, Fla., a chef cooks up real deal gnocchi, and an out-of-this-world spot goes huge with a monster pork chop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing an international playlist of flavor. In Florida, a funky spot is putting a Mediterranean spin on burgers, while a local gem is dishing out Puerto Rican specialties. In Las Vegas, a real deal Mexican joint has bomb birria tacos.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's unhinging his jaw for some sandwiches and big-time burgers; in Palm Desert, Calif., a market-deli is piling up the porchetta; a burger joint is adding over-the-top twists; in Nashville, Tenn., a Vietnamese spot is making the bomb banh mi.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's piling up the meat with a little sweet; in Santa Barbara, Calif., a hidden gem is putting out funky fusion like Korean paella; in Florida, a Boynton Beach butcher is elevating porchetta; a Boca Raton food truck is cooking cheesecake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri jumps into a full culinary adventure in San Diego where there's a spot servin' Baja-style tacos and a funky food truck puttin' out next-level shawarma; in Taos, N.M., a pan-Asian joint pulls out the stops with a Reuben banh mi.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: An uncle-nephew duo is changing the game in Gainesville, Fla., with a fried chicken sandwich; there's Mexican gone vegan in Dallas, Texas; a spot in Baton Rouge, LA, is putting their stamp on pot pie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Southern, Western and North of the Border
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out scratch-made Italian in Buffalo, Wyo., a gluten-free Venezuelan spot in Calgary, Alberta, and a southern Caribbean mashup serving oxtail with extra spice in Memphis, Tenn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: From Bunny Chow to Chicken Oysters
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into the unexpected; a South African spot in Black Mountain, N.C., is cooking lights-out lamb curry; a chef in San Jose, Calif., is bringing big flavor to beef barbacoa; a Boynton Beach, Fla., joint is serving up chicken oysters.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out a unique spin on turkey tamales in Indianapolis, prime-time pan-seared chicken in Bradley Beach, NJ, and fully loaded lamb chops in Columbus, OH.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Laramie, Wyo, a restaurant-bar has nachos, and a spot is cooking up a vegetarian banh mi; a Mexican place in Alaska is serving duck tacos.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Down South & South of the Border
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries standout seafood at an old ice cream shop in Tybee Island, Ga., and culinary comfort food in Savannah, Ga.; in Boise, Idaho, a taco spot gets creative with their carnitas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing big flavor in some unexpected spots; there are south-of-the-border classics cooked up in Calgary, culinary masterpieces in a Memphis museum and an authentic British pub tucked away at a tiny Colorado airport.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's in Sicily, Italy, eating up local flavor; a pizzeria is spinning out creative twists on traditional pies; a cheffed-up spot is dishing out next-level langoustine spaghettone; a father-daughter duo is serving succulent seafood linguine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
